summary: Add 'events brief --window N --dma <id>' markdown renderer that groups local events by date → venue → events with classification labels and (when available) price ranges.
reason: Persona D (newsletter author) workflow + user-vision Obsidian/iMessage composition. Mechanical group-by + markdown formatting; no API endpoint produces formatted reports.
validated_outcome: --help pass; --watchlist flag composes with the watchlist table from the events-watchlist patch.
